properties.title: Hazy and Shumates area
properties.body_md: Legendary Hazy Creek is surrounded by strip mines, and Shumate Branch has been buried beneath more than two billion gallons of toxic coal sludge.
properties.image: Failed initial if statement in InfoWindow.class.php

properties.title: Changes in Marfork Hollow
properties.body_md: Listen to Charles Ballard explain how MTR has devastated the land, communities and heritage and how the lives of Coal River residents have been irreparably altered.

properties.title: Native American Land Use on Paint Mountain
Site of airplane crash
properties.body_md: A small, prop-driven military airplane crash landed here in the mid-1960s.  According to local knowledge, one of two people survived the crash.  Unfortunately, she was unable to survive long enough for search parties to find her.
